attributes.description: Cluster listing with resource utilization, and node/pod counts.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

embeddableConfig.content:
## ⓘ

Cluster metadata isn't enabled by default for most K8s OTel receivers.

Check the Elastic docs for configuration best-practices.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS namespaces = COUNT_DISTINCT(resource.attributes.k8s.namespace.name), pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(resource.attributes.k8s.pod.uid) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    node_ready = AVG(k8s.node.condition_ready),
    cpu_usage  = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu  = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws     = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem  = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    fs_usage   = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap     = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    namespaces = MAX(namespaces),
    pods = MAX(pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    cpu_pct  = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 2),
    mem_pct  = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| STATS
    healthy_pct = AVG(node_ready),
    nodes       = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    cpu_util    = AVG(cpu_pct),
    mem_util    = AVG(mem_pct),
    disk_util   = AVG(disk_pct),
    namespaces  = MAX(namespaces),
    pods        = MAX(pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name

FROM metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS namespaces = COUNT_DISTINCT(resource.attributes.k8s.namespace.name), pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(resource.attributes.k8s.pod.uid) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    node_ready = AVG(k8s.node.condition_ready),
    cpu_usage  = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu  = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws     = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem  = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    fs_usage   = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap     = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    namespaces = MAX(namespaces),
    pods = MAX(pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    cpu_pct  = ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 2),
    mem_pct  = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4),
    disk_pct = ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4)
| STATS
    healthy_pct = AVG(node_ready),
    nodes       = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    cpu_util    = AVG(cpu_pct),
    mem_util    = AVG(mem_pct),
    disk_util   = AVG(disk_pct),
    namespaces  = MAX(namespaces),
    pods        = MAX(pods)
  BY k8s.cluster.name

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_clusters = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.cluster.name)

TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.uid,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL is_unhealthy = CASE(
    phase == 1, 1,
    phase >= 4, 1,
    0)
| STATS unhealthy_pods = SUM(is_unhealthy)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| INLINE STATS overall_unhealthy = AVG(unhealthy_pods) BY k8s.cluster.name
| INLINE STATS rank_threshold = MV_SLICE(MV_SORT(VALUES(overall_unhealthy)), -10, -1)
| WHERE overall_unhealthy >= MV_MIN(rank_threshold)
| DROP overall_unhealthy, rank_threshold
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.pod.uid,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL is_unhealthy = CASE(
    phase == 1, 1,
    phase >= 4, 1,
    0)
| STATS unhealthy_pods = SUM(is_unhealthy)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| INLINE STATS overall_unhealthy = AVG(unhealthy_pods) BY k8s.cluster.name
| INLINE STATS rank_threshold = MV_SLICE(MV_SORT(VALUES(overall_unhealthy)), -10, -1)
| WHERE overall_unhealthy >= MV_MIN(rank_threshold)
| DROP overall_unhealthy, rank_threshold
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Number of unhealthy pods per cluster: total unique pods minus pods in Running phase (phase=2).
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by non-running pods

query.esql:
TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    desired = MAX(TO_DOUBLE(k8s.deployment.desired)),
    available = MAX(TO_DOUBLE(k8s.deployment.available))
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.namespace.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    sum_desired = SUM(desired),
    sum_available = SUM(available),
    pod_delta = SUM(desired) - SUM(available)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| INLINE STATS overall_delta = AVG(pod_delta) BY k8s.cluster.name
| INLINE STATS rank_threshold = MV_SLICE(MV_SORT(VALUES(overall_delta)), -10, -1)
| WHERE overall_delta >= MV_MIN(rank_threshold)
| DROP overall_delta, rank_threshold
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.deployment.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    desired = MAX(TO_DOUBLE(k8s.deployment.desired)),
    available = MAX(TO_DOUBLE(k8s.deployment.available))
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.deployment.name, k8s.namespace.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    sum_desired = SUM(desired),
    sum_available = SUM(available),
    pod_delta = SUM(desired) - SUM(available)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| INLINE STATS overall_delta = AVG(pod_delta) BY k8s.cluster.name
| INLINE STATS rank_threshold = MV_SLICE(MV_SORT(VALUES(overall_delta)), -10, -1)
| WHERE overall_delta >= MV_MIN(rank_threshold)
| DROP overall_delta, rank_threshold
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Gap between desired and available replicas across all deployments per cluster. Positive value = under-provisioned.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by desired vs actual pods delta

query.esql:
TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_pct = cpu_usage / alloc_cpu
| STATS cpu_util = AVG(cpu_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| INLINE STATS overall_cpu = AVG(cpu_util) BY k8s.cluster.name
| INLINE STATS rank_threshold = MV_SLICE(MV_SORT(VALUES(overall_cpu)), -10, -1)
| WHERE overall_cpu >= MV_MIN(rank_threshold)
| DROP overall_cpu, rank_threshold
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_pct = cpu_usage / alloc_cpu
| STATS cpu_util = AVG(cpu_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket
| INLINE STATS overall_cpu = AVG(cpu_util) BY k8s.cluster.name
| INLINE STATS rank_threshold = MV_SLICE(MV_SORT(VALUES(overall_cpu)), -10, -1)
| WHERE overall_cpu >= MV_MIN(rank_threshold)
| DROP overall_cpu, rank_threshold
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: CPU utilization per cluster: total CPU usage / total allocatable CPU across all nodes.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by CPU utilization

TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    mem_ws    = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),

| EVAL mem_pct = TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem)
| STATS mem_util = AVG(mem_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket

| INLINE STATS rank_threshold = MV_SLICE(MV_SORT(VALUES(overall_mem)), -10, -1)
| WHERE overall_mem >= MV_MIN(rank_threshold)

TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL

    mem_ws    = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),

  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name,
     time_bucket = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_pct = TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem)
| STATS mem_util = AVG(mem_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket

query.esql:
TS metrics-*.otel*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
| WHERE k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
| STATS
    fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),

| STATS disk_util = AVG(disk_pct)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, time_bucket

embeddableConfig.description: Disk usage per cluster: total filesystem usage / total filesystem capacity across all nodes.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 clusters by disk usage

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes
| STATS healthy_count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE ready_nodes == total_nodes
| STATS healthy_count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes
| STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(@timestamp) BY k8s.node.name
| WHERE @timestamp == latest_ts
| STATS
    total_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name),
    ready_nodes = COUNT_DISTINCT(k8s.node.name) WHERE k8s.node.condition_ready > 0
  BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE ready_nodes < total_nodes
| STATS unhealthy_count = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Clusters with at least one not-ready node. Uses k8s.node.condition_ready to classify health.

attributes.title: [OTEL][Kubernetes] Clusters
